---
title: "Zoom In: An Introduction to Circuits"
description: "Distill on understanding neural-network circuits well enough to predict the effect of weight edits."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-03-11"
categories: [deep learning, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Zoom In: An Introduction to Circuits. Image from [Distill](https://distill.pub/2020/circuits/zoom-in/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"…if you understand a circuit, you should be able to predict what will change if you edit the weights. In fact, for small enough circuits, statements about their behavior become questions of mathematical reasoning."

Looking forward to it.

<https://lnkd.in/efJwFNk>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_zoom-in-an-introduction-to-circuits-activity-6643377035341283328-wuKl).*
